headline: Lambda Assembles Leadership Team to Power Gigawatt-Scale AI Infrastructure for the Superintelligence Era
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 05, 2026--Lambda, the Superintelligence Cloud, today announced an expanded leadership structure assembled to match the scale of the opportunity in front of the company. As demand for AI compute accelerates globally, Lambda has built the strongest leadership team in its history, bringing in new executives with large-scale capital formation and infrastructure deployment experience.

headline: Geoforce Launches GT1c with AT&T Business, Transforming Industrial Markets with Affordable Rugged Cellular Asset Tracking
summary: Geoforce, the global leader in rugged asset tracking, is proud to announce the launch of the GT1c. The GT1c leverages cellular technology and has a more cost-effective, purpose-built design to enable rugged cellular equipment tracking at scale. The GT1c complements Geoforce's full range of satellite tracking devices.

headline: AT&T Has the Fastest Upload Speeds in America
summary: In a new report, AT&T leads the nation in fastest upload experience, with speeds more than 2x faster than the closest competitor

headline: Lumen’s Consumer Fiber Sale and AI Network Pivot Could Be A Game Changer For Lumen Technologies (LUMN)
summary: Lumen Technologies recently released its first-quarter results after the close, following the completion of its sale of the consumer fiber-to-the-home business to AT&T and progress on using the proceeds to reduce debt and sharpen its focus on enterprise fiber and AI-oriented low-latency networks. By issuing new guarantees for Level 3’s first-lien obligations and consolidating SEC reporting, Lumen is simplifying its corporate structure just as it pivots away from consumer broadband toward...
